system.powerDescription:
Everyone laughs at the jester. No action you take will be viewed as strange or illegal by mundane humans. This includes theft, property destruction, and similar criminal activities. Affected humans may still deny requests you make of them and the actions of your allies will still fall under scrutiny. This effect ends early if you physically harm a creature and creatures may realize the criminality of your actions after the power ends. 

Gain or grant +1D when you or an ally next take advantage of this power. This power may easily modify the parameters of a roll while active.
